description_long: This stretcher features a sturdy metal frame with a scissor-lift mechanism, allowing for adjustable height. The top surface is covered with a blue mattress pad, providing comfort for the patient. Four caster wheels are attached to the base, enabling smooth mobility across various surfaces. Side rails run along both sides of the stretcher, offering safety and preventing accidental falls. At each end, there are curved handles designed for manual maneuvering and lifting. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for emergency or patient transport in urban healthcare settings.
description: A robust stretcher with a blue mattress pad, metal frame, side rails, wheels, and handles for safe and mobile patient transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved handle, blue mattress pad, and two front wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the stretcher, side rail, scissor-lift frame, and all four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite handle, blue mattress pad, and rear wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side rail, scissor-lift frame, and wheels from the other side.
